stories.title: The Consumer Has Not Quit. The Economy Still Feels Cautious.
stories.dek: The American economy is still growing, but it is doing so with less exuberance, less labor-market churn, and more dependence on household spending than the public rhetoric admits.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The Consumer Has Not Quit. The Economy Still Feels Cautious.

stories.title: The Crowd Came Back. The Old Economics Did Not.
stories.dek: Broadway’s record grosses and rising attendance across the arts show that American cultural life is alive again — but not evenly, and not on the same business terms as before.

stories.title: AI Needs Electricity, Steel, and Time
stories.dek: Behind the chatbot boom is a slower race over transformers, substations, fabs, and the people who know how to build them.
